//: Beacon5 v2 — Realtime Database security rules.
RTDB carries low-latency live state: active campus threat, beacon heartbeats,
presence. Persistent / queryable data lives in Firestore (see firestore.rules).
All paths are scoped under /campuses/$campusId/... Tenant isolation by token
claim auth.token.campusId === $campusId. Server-only writes for everything
except the user's own presence row.
Custom claims expected (set server-side after login):
⚠ DO NOT DEPLOY YET — see server/firestore-rules/README.md
The running v1 monolith writes anonymously to /beacon5/events. Deploying
these rules before Phase 0 step 2 (auth) lands will break v1 immediately.

active.//: Mirror of the latest CampusThreat doc — read-only mirror.

heartbeat.//: Server writes a periodic heartbeat so staff dashboards show live activity.

$userId.//: Each user writes their own online/offline state. Used to surface 'present in app' vs not.
